_layout.note: The 'canonical' list mirrors sim.pentamachine.com v0.9.20's Change Machine menu exactly. The 'extended' list captures real Penta hardware variants (CHB/CHK spindle upgrades, V2-8L long-Z) that ship as production hardware but aren't published in the official simulator's machine catalogue today.

models.name: Penta Solo
models.notes: Penta Solo — entry-level 5-axis. Same kinematic chain as V2-50; envelope per Penta Machine spec sheet.

models.name: Pocket NC V1
models.notes: Original V1 (post-2014 production). TCPC available only after Kinetic Control upgrade.

models.name: Pocket NC V1 Kickstarter
models.notes: Original Kickstarter-edition V1 (the very first batch). Slightly different homing and limit-switch wiring vs production V1; envelope identical.

models.name: Pocket NC V2-10
models.notes: Smaller-table V2. Same controller, same post, smaller XY. Modern Pocket NC entry point.

models.name: Pocket NC V2-50
models.notes: Default machine in the simulator. Envelope confirmed by Penta Machine (Matt, 2026-04-27).

models.name: Pocket NC V2-50CHB
models.notes: V2-50 chassis with high-speed brushless spindle (CHB). Same envelope, 5× spindle RPM ceiling — short HSS / micro-tooling friendly. Suite-only; not in sim.pentamachine.com.

models.name: Pocket NC V2-50CHK
models.notes: V2-50 chassis with Kinetic-Control-integrated high-speed spindle (CHK). Same envelope, full TCPC and rigid tapping. Suite-only; not in sim.pentamachine.com.

models.name: Pocket NC V2-8L
models.notes: Long-Z variant. TCPC defaults OFF; requires advanced-software-upgrade. Suite-only; not in sim.pentamachine.com.

_source: Canonical 5 (Solo, V1, V1 Kickstarter, V2-10, V2-50) mirror the Change Machine dropdown at sim.pentamachine.com v0.9.20 (audited 2026-04-27 via Chrome MCP). V2-50 envelope confirmed by Matt @ Penta Machine. Extended models (CHB, CHK, V2-8L) are real Penta hardware variants tracked in the Suite for completeness but absent from the official sim catalogue.
